nasb.text: and Bakbakkar, Heresh and Galal and Mattaniah the son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph,

esv.text: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal and Mattaniah the son of Mica, son of Zichri, son of Asaph;

cnv.text: 又有拔巴甲、黑勒施、迦拉，和亞薩的曾孫、細基利的孫子、米迦的兒子瑪探雅；

ccb.text: 拔巴甲、黑勒施、迦拉和亚萨的曾孙、细基利的孙子、米迦的儿子玛探雅，
